hero.title: Azerbaijan eVisa Requirements
hero.subtitle: Review all required documents and eligibility criteria before starting your application. Complete applications are processed significantly faster.

generalDocs.title: General Requirements
generalDocs.subtitle: All visa applicants must provide the following documents

passport.name: Valid Passport
passport.desc: Must be valid for at least 6 months beyond your intended travel dates and have at least 2 blank pages.

photo.name: Digital Photo
photo.desc: Passport-style photo (3.5 × 4.5 cm, white background, taken within the last 6 months).

email.name: Email Address
email.desc: A valid email address to receive your approved eVisa document and any correspondence.

payment.name: Payment Card
payment.desc: Valid credit or debit card (Visa, Mastercard or Amex) for the visa fee payment.

travel.name: Travel Itinerary
travel.desc: Confirmed return or onward flight ticket showing entry and departure dates.

accommodation.name: Proof of Accommodation
accommodation.desc: Hotel booking confirmation, invitation letter or Airbnb reservation for your stay.

tabs.title: Requirements by Visa Category
tabs.subtitle: Select your intended visa type to view specific additional requirements

process.title: How to Apply
process.subtitle: Complete your application in 4 simple steps

step1.title: Check Requirements
step1.desc: Confirm your nationality is eligible and gather all required documents listed on this page.

step2.title: Fill Application Form
step2.desc: Complete the online form with your personal details exactly as they appear in your passport.

step3.title: Upload & Pay
step3.desc: Upload your photo, select a processing speed and pay securely by credit or debit card.

step4.title: Receive Your eVisa
step4.desc: Your approved eVisa PDF will be emailed to you. Print it and present it at the port of entry.

items.heading: Validity vs. Maximum Stay
items.body: The visa validity period is how long you have to enter Azerbaijan from the date of issue. The maximum stay is the number of days you may remain once inside. These are two different limits — check your visa carefully.

items.heading: Photo Requirements
items.body: Photos must be JPEG or PNG, minimum 400×500 px, maximum 5 MB. No glasses, hats or sunglasses. Background must be plain white or off-white.

items.heading: Passport Validity Rule
items.body: Your passport must remain valid for at least 6 months after the last date you plan to be in Azerbaijan. Check the expiry date before applying.

items.heading: Multiple-Entry Visas
items.body: Business eVisas typically allow multiple entries. Tourist and transit visas are generally single-entry. If you plan to exit and re-enter Azerbaijan you will need a multiple-entry visa.

cta.title: Ready to Apply?
cta.subtitle: Once you have all documents ready, starting your application takes less than 10 minutes.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

items.q: How long does it take to process a visa application?
items.a: Standard processing takes 3 business days. Express processing guarantees a decision within 24 hours.

items.q: Can I get a refund if my visa is rejected?
items.a: The azEvisa service fee is refunded in full for rejected applications. The government visa fee is non-refundable.

items.q: How will I receive my approved visa?
items.a: Your approved e-Visa will be sent directly to your email address as a PDF document.

hero.title: Azerbaijan eVisa Types
hero.subtitle: The Republic of Azerbaijan offers a streamlined electronic visa process tailored to your travel needs. Whether you are visiting for leisure, business, or education, ensure you select the appropriate visa category to facilitate a seamless entry into the Land of Fire.

cta.title: Unsure which visa you need?
cta.subtitle: Our automated eligibility wizard can help you determine the exact requirements for your nationality and purpose of travel in less than 2 minutes.

tourism.name: Tourism eVisa
tourism.description: Perfect for sightseeing, visiting family, or attending cultural events in Azerbaijan. This single-entry visa is the fastest way to explore the historic Old City of Baku.

business.name: Business eVisa
business.description: Designed for professionals attending conferences, meetings, or negotiating trade deals. Efficiently handles all corporate travel requirements.

transit.name: Transit eVisa
transit.description: Short-term entry for travelers passing through Azerbaijan to a third destination.

student.name: Student eVisa
student.description: For international students enrolled in recognized Azerbaijani educational institutions.

work.name: Work Permit
work.description: Official authorization for foreign nationals to engage in professional employment.
